data.title: LSI Industries to release Q1 2026 results on Nov 6, 2025; conference call at 11:00am ET for financial review.
data.description: Cincinnati-based LSI Industries, Inc., a prominent manufacturer of commercial lighting and display solutions in the U.S., is set to announce its fiscal 2026 first quarter results on Thursday, November 6, 2025, before the market opens. The company, listed on Nasdaq as LYTS, will host a conference call at 11:00 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into its financial performance, provide insights on recent developments, and engage in a question-and-answer session. Interested parties can also access a webcast of the conference call.

data.title: F.N.B. Corporation reported Q3 2025 earnings with $149.5M net income, $0.41 per diluted share, and record revenue of $457M. Tangible book value per common share grew 11% YoY, reaching a return on common equity ratio of 15%. Total assets for the quarter were $50B. Call scheduled for October 17, 2025, at 8:30 AM ET for further details.
data.description: F.N.B. Corporation reported a record revenue of $457 million in the third quarter of 2025, leading to earnings per diluted common share of $0.41, a 37% increase from the previous year. Net income available to common shareholders was $149.5 million, compared to $110.1 million in the third quarter of 2024. The company's tangible book value per common share had a year-over-year growth of 11%. Average loans totaled $34.8 billion, with an increase in consumer loans, while deposits totaled $37.9 billion, increasing 6.4%. Net interest income was $359.3 million, a record, and non-interest income reached $98.2 million. The loan-to-deposit ratio was 91% at the end of the quarter. The company also reported strong asset quality metrics and record capital levels, with a CET1 regulatory capital ratio of 11%. Non-GAAP financial metrics were used to measure the company's performance, with reconciliations provided in the release. Furthermore, the company provided a cautionary statement regarding forward-looking information and announced a conference call to discuss the financial results.

data.title: Simmons First National Corp reports $562.8M net loss in Q3 2025, raised $327M equity capital, adjusted EPS $0.46. Market impacted.
data.description: Simmons First National Corporation reported a net loss of $562.8 million for Q3 2025, compared to net income of $54.8 million in Q2 2025 and $24.7 million in Q3 2024. Diluted earnings per share were $(4.00) for Q3 2025. They raised $327 million of equity capital to reposition the balance sheet, partially realized the benefits in the quarter, and reported adjusted earnings of $64.9 million for Q3 2025. Total loans were $17.189 billion, total deposits were $19.838 billion, and total assets were $24.208 billion. Net interest income was $186.7 million. Noninterest income was negative $756.2 million due to a loss on the sale of securities. Noninterest expense was $142.0 million. The Company did not repurchase shares in Q3 2025. Stockholders' equity was $3.354 billion, book value per share was $23.18, and tangible book value per share was $13.45. Total stockholders' equity to total assets was 13.9%. Regulator capital ratios exceed "well-capitalized" levels. Non-GAAP financial measures were utilized. Forward-looking statements were made about the Company's future. The Company's conference call discussed this information. Simmons First National Corporation operates more than 220 branches and offers comprehensive financial solutions. Additional details are in the full news story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Under Armour (NYSE: UA, UAA) will release Q2 fiscal 2026 results on Nov 6, 2025 after news release at 6:55am ET.
data.description: In Baltimore, on October 16, 2025, Under Armour, Inc. (NYSE: UA, UAA) announced that it will disclose its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, which concluded on September 30, 2025, on November 6, 2025. The news will be unveiled at 6:55 a.m. Eastern Time (ET), followed by a conference call led by Under Armour management. For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: NETCLASS TECHNOLOGY INC reported decreased revenue of $3.7 million in the first half of FY 2025, leading to a net loss of $4.9 million. Operating expenses surged by 94.7%, contributing to a loss increase of 140%. Gross profit declined by 47.7%. The financial results were adjusted from previous announcements on Sept. 30, 2025.
data.description: NetClass Technology Inc, a prominent B2B smart education IT solutions provider, based in Shanghai, Hong Kong, Singapore, and Tokyo, has recently adjusted its unaudited financial results for the first half of fiscal year 2025. The revenue for the period ending March 31, 2025, was approximately $3.7 million, down 3.0% from the same period in 2024. The gross profit dropped by 47.7% to $305,390, while operating expenses surged by 94.7% to $5.5 million, resulting in a net loss of $4,955,643 compared to $2,065,011 in 2024. The net loss saw a significant increase of 140.0%. This setback was mainly due to the rise in operating expenses and a decrease in gross profit, despite a slight increase in other income. NetClass offers various IT solutions in education, including SaaS subscription services and application software development. The company aims to provide reliable products for sustainable growth. Forward-looking statements have been included in their announcement, cautioning about potential uncertainties affecting future results. For further details, contact NetClass Technology Inc Investor Relations at ir@netclasstech.com.

data.title: Cohen & Steers Q3 2025 results released. Conference call on Oct 17, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (ET). Earnings info on their website.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (CNS) disclosed its quarterly results for the period ending September 30, 2025. The earnings report and accompanying presentation are accessible on the company's website, www.cohenandsteers.com, under "Company—Investor Relations—Earnings Archive." Additionally, a conference call is scheduled for October 17, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (ET) regarding this update. For further details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: GeoPark acquires 100% working interest in blocks in Vaca Muerta, Argentina, becoming operator.
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia, GeoPark Limited, a renowned independent energy company with 20+ years of experience in Latin America, has successfully finalized the acquisition from Pluspetrol S.A. of a 100% operated working interest in the Loma Jarillosa Este and Puesto Silva Oeste blocks situated in the Vaca Muerta formation's black oil window in Neuquén Province, Argentina. This acquisition expands GeoPark's foothold in the region, allowing for increased operations and exploration opportunities. GeoPark's stock is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol GPRK, emphasizing its position as a key player in the energy sector.

data.title: Intrepid Potash, Inc. (NYSE: IPI) to announce Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 5, 2025, after market close. Conference call on Nov 6 at 12:00 p.m. ET for investors.
data.description: Denver-based company Intrepid Potash, Inc. (NYSE: IPI) is set to announce its third-quarter financial results for 2025 on Wednesday, November 5th after the market closes. Following this, the company will conduct a conference call on Thursday, November 6th, starting at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. During the call, Intrepid's management will delve into the financial outcomes, operational updates, and address queries from investors. To participate, individuals can dial in using the toll-free number 1 (800) 715-9871 for domestic callers or the accompanying International dial-in code.

data.title: Chemours will release Q3 2025 earnings on a webcast conference call; details to follow. Del. Headquarter.
data.description: Chemours, based in Wilmington, Delaware, has announced the dates for its third-quarter 2025 earnings release and webcast conference call. The event is scheduled to take place in the near future, providing investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's financial performance during that period. This announcement signifies an important milestone for the company as it looks to share key financial metrics and strategic updates. Stay tuned for more information on this significant event.

data.title: NextDecade has made a positive Final Investment Decision on Train 5 at Rio Grande LNG, closed financial transactions to fully fund Train 5 and issued notice to proceed to Bechtel. Second FID in just over a month.
data.description: NextDecade Corporation (NASDAQ: NEXT) has declared a positive final investment decision (FID) on Train 5 at Rio Grande LNG in Houston. The company closed financial transactions to completely fund Train 5 and its related infrastructure. The full notice to proceed has been issued to Bechtel Energy Inc. for Train 5. This marks the second FID for NextDecade in a little over a month, signifying a significant step forward in their operations.

data.title: Lexeo Therapeutics plans to offer common stock and pre-funded warrants in a new proposed offering. #biotech #finance
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global population has reached a staggering 7.9 billion, with an estimated 60% living in urban areas. The study also shows that the average life expectancy has increased to 72.6 years. Additionally, the report indicates that the total number of COVID-19 cases has surpassed 150 million worldwide, with over 3 million deaths recorded. Despite the challenges posed by the pandemic, the global economy is projected to grow by 4% this year. In terms of vaccination efforts, around 1.2 billion doses have been administered globally. Overall, these statistics reflect the ongoing impact of population growth, urbanization, health crises, and economic developments on a global scale.

data.title: Alice Yake (Jackson) joins Liberty Energy Inc. Board of Directors, bringing expertise in energy infrastructure and power generation. CEO Ron Gusek welcomes her appointment.
data.description: Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) based in Denver revealed the addition of Alice Yake (Jackson) to its Board of Directors. CEO Ron Gusek expressed excitement over Yake joining the board, citing her vast experience in energy infrastructure and power generation as valuable for the company's growth. Yake's appointment signals a strategic move for Liberty Power Innovations business.

data.title: Rithm Property Trust Inc. to release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 31, 2025, with conference call at 8:00 AM Eastern Time.

data.title: Arcosa, Inc. will release Q3 results on October 30, 2025, and host an earnings call on October 31, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE: ACA), a company specializing in infrastructure products and solutions, revealed they will unveil their third-quarter results for the period ending September 30, 2025, after market closure on Thursday, October 30, 2025. Subsequently, on Friday, October 31, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, the Company will conduct an earnings call to discuss these results. The call can be joined via webcast and slide presentation at https://ir.arcosa.com.
